Reel.title: Reel
Reel.description: A video reel uploaded by a user

creator.description: The display name of the reel creator

avatar.description: The URL of the creator's avatar image

caption.description: The text caption or description of the reel

song.description: The name of the song or audio track associated with the reel

videoBg.description: The CSS background class or representation of background when video is loading

videoUrl.description: The direct public URL of the uploaded video in Firebase Storage

likes.description: The number of likes the reel has received

commentsCount.description: The number of comments on the reel

liked.description: Whether the current user liked the reel

privacy.description: The privacy setting of the reel

location.description: The location tag of the reel

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the reel was created

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A private chat conversation between two users

Message.title: Message
Message.description: An individual private chat message inside a conversation

/reels/{reelId}.description: Collection of all uploaded video reels

/conversations/{conversationId}.description: Collection of direct messaging channels between users

/conversations/{conversationId}/messages.description: Subcollection of all message records in a conversation thread
